title: 6Pcs Velvet Butterfly with Clip,Glitter Butterflies Christmas Ornaments for Xmas Tree Decoration Crafts Wreath Festive Holiday Wedding Home Decor, 12 x 8.5 cm (Dark Green)
features: PACKAGE CONTENTS: Set of 6 plush velvet butterfly ornaments with glitter accents (12 x 8.5 cm), perfect for Christmas tree decorations, wreaths, and festive holiday crafts. Ideal for butterfly Christmas tree decor and DIY projects.
STUNNING DESIGN: Elegant luxury velvet butterfly decorations with shimmering glitter details, adding a touch of sophistication to your Christmas butterfly decor, weddings, or themed parties.
PREMIUM MATERIAL: Made from high-quality plush velvet and sparkling glitter, these festive butterfly ornaments are durable, soft, and visually captivating for any holiday or home décor.
CONVENIENT ATTACHMENT: Each butterfly ornament features a secure clip for easy fastening to Christmas trees, wreaths, garlands, gift boxes, or hair accessories—effortless festive styling!

description: Elevate Your Holiday & Home Decor with Stunning Velvet Butterfly Ornaments! Bring a touch of elegance and whimsy to your Christmas tree, wedding venue, or home décor with this exquisite set of 6 velvet butterfly ornaments. Each butterfly is crafted from luxurious plush velvet and adorned with sparkling glitter accents, creating a dazzling effect that catches the light beautifully. Measuring 12 x 8.5 cm, these butterfly Christmas tree decorations are the perfect size to stand out while maintaining a delicate charm. Why You’ll Love These Butterfly Ornaments: ✔ Premium Velvet & Glitter Design – Made from high-quality, soft velvet with shimmering glitter details, these festive butterfly ornaments add a luxurious and eye-catching touch to any décor. ✔ Easy Clip-On Attachment – Each butterfly features a built-in clip for effortless hanging on Christmas tree branches, wreaths, garlands, gift wraps, or even as hair accessories for weddings and parties. ✔ Versatile Holiday & Everyday Decor – Perfect for Christmas trees, winter weddings, baby showers, spring crafts, scrapbooking, wall art, and themed parties. Their timeless design ensures year-round use! ✔ Great for DIY & Crafting – Whether you’re decorating a holiday centerpiece, creating a fairy garden, or embellishing a gift box, these glitter butterfly ornaments add a magical, elegant touch to any project. ✔ Set of 6 for Ample Decorating – With six unique butterflies in one pack, you’ll have plenty to adorn multiple spaces—mix and match for a coordinated yet dynamic festive display. Perfect For: Christmas Tree Decorations – Hang them on your Xmas tree for a glamorous, nature-inspired look. Wedding & Party Decor – Use them as table centerpieces, backdrop accents, or hair clips for a romantic vibe. Home & Seasonal Crafts – Style them on wreaths, garlands, or wall art for a festive or spring-themed atmosphere. Gift Embellishments – Add a decorative touch to presents, gift bags, or scrapbooking projects. Package Includes: 6 x Velvet Glitter Butterfly Ornaments (12 x 8.5 cm each) Make Your Holidays & Special Moments Shine! Whether you're decorating for Christmas, a wedding, or just adding a bit of sparkle to your everyday décor, these velvet butterfly ornaments are a must-have. Ideal Gift Idea – A beautiful present for craft lovers, holiday decorators, and anyone who adores luxurious, festive accents!
